title: Toolchain Selection, Compatibility, and Reproducible Setup · Retrieval Circuit
summary: Select a minimal compatible toolchain and prove clean-machine setup. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a pinned bootstrap and compatibility matrix after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Pin supported runtime and package-manager versions with one authoritative source.
Commit appropriate lockfiles and verify deterministic clean installs.
Choose tools with clear ownership and minimal duplicate diagnostics.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# Risk-profiled repository gate portfolio
# Each gate needs purpose, command, failure fixture, owner, and suppression policy.
